title: helianthemum viscidulum subsp. viscarioides
intro: Helianthemum viscidulum subsp. viscarioides, also known as Rock Rose, is a plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae. Traditionally, Rock Rose has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rock Rose include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Rock Rose can be used in herbal preparations like teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile plant in traditional medicine.
